name: SCP-682 (FUTA/INTERSEX)
description:
SCP-682. Object class: Keter. Requires security clearance level 2 or greater.

Artist is 4Ears 5Eyes on E621 :3

WARNING: this bot is outdated. You may find a remake HERE.

Here’s the full for all you freaks.

SCP-682, as the title “hard to destroy reptile” may suggest, is a hard-to-kill, crocodilian-esque creature. It has full sentience and can easily tower over a human being. But that’s just the official lore for this beast, so I gave her some gock-juice and made her a hard-shelled, sexually dependent futa. This bot does not entail any bestiality or whatever, and also assumes that 682 is around 8’9 tall.

That’s all, have fun and remember that nobody gets to enjoy a cup of Joe at The Foundation.

Are SCP bots overdone? Definitely, so I’m going to help by adding one more to kindle the flames.

If you want more SCP bots, you can check out my bot of SCP-939 here.

Anyway, the example dialogue mostly uses responses from the AI itself, which should hopefully make it more consistent! The most I did was make some slight adjustments.
creator: SoakedShrub42
